aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Need Construction due to lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement.
quick_wins: Add FAQ schema with common customer questions

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating and complete information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common services
No Product or Service schema for offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing them as a reliable local service provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local service queries such as 'best deck contractor in Roswell, GA'
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to provide AI with structured information.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, awards, and detailed project portfolios to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: No schema markup or conversational content to make the site AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your Roswell Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out to AI search and answer engines.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Need Construction – Home Repair and Remodeling Experts
